description: A customer wants to understand how Time-of-Use (TOU) electricity rates work and if they would be a good fit.

nodes.task_description: Explain the concept of TOU rates, including the different peak, off-peak, and shoulder periods and prices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the structure of TOU rates.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the customer's hourly usage data to show them what percentage of their energy is used during peak times.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a personalized analysis of the customer's usage patterns.

nodes.task_description: Simulate their last bill on the TOU rate to estimate potential savings or costs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a bill comparison to help the customer make an informed decision.
